# Vendored menu-bar icon frames

`CrabFrames.swift`, `SparkFrames.swift` and `LogoFrame.swift` contain the
animated Clawd-crab and Claude-spark menu-bar frames adapted from
**claude-status-bar** by Mick Cesanek (https://github.com/m1ckc3s/claude-status-bar),
used under its MIT license. The Claude spark mark and Clawd crab are
trademarks of Anthropic.
